findings.issue: Bare except clause in load_memory() silently swallows all errors including corrupt JSON, file permission issues, and disk errors.
findings.suggestion: Catch specific exceptions: except (FileNotFoundError, json.JSONDecodeError) to distinguish real failures from missing file.
findings.est_impact: Silent corruption of memory state; hard to debug agent failures

findings.issue: Bare except in notify() masks network failures, timeouts, and Jarvis service unavailability with no logging.
findings.suggestion: Log the exception or return success/failure boolean so caller knows notification failed.
findings.est_impact: Agent believes notifications sent when Jarvis is down; operational blindness

findings.issue: Full article text truncated to 3000 chars in prompt, but text extraction loop already limits to 4000 chars—redundant truncation wastes tokens in prompt overhead.
findings.suggestion: Standardize to single truncation point (e.g., 3000) before sending to /chat endpoint.
findings.est_impact: ~200-400 tokens wasted per analysis call across 10+ articles

findings.issue: Page navigation timeout exception caught but only printed; if login page reached, function returns silently without recording failure state.
findings.suggestion: Explicitly track and log authentication failures separately to avoid repeated login-wall attempts on next run.
findings.est_impact: Agent loops futilely on login failures; wastes compute and time

findings.issue: Bare except in requests.head() redirect chain silently skips malformed URLs, timeouts, and SSL errors without distinction.
findings.suggestion: Catch (requests.Timeout, requests.ConnectionError, requests.InvalidURL) separately to log genuine network issues.
findings.est_impact: Silent data loss; legitimate articles marked as unreachable without evidence

findings.issue: Hard-coded keyword list 'ai_keywords' filters but misses common agent patterns: 'agent framework', 'system prompt', 'tool calling'—over-filters relevant articles.
findings.suggestion: Move keywords to memory.json config so Agent 06 can update its own filters based on what Conor finds useful.
findings.est_impact: Miss 10-20% of actionable research articles; dead ends in discovery loop

findings.issue: Page.goto() exception caught but passes silently; stale page content may be analyzed as fresh article without warning.
findings.suggestion: Log or flag partial-load states; track failed URLs to prevent re-processing.
findings.est_impact: Duplicate/corrupted insights saved to memory; pollutes research feed
